articles.title: 'Remove straws but still using plastic cups?' Starbucks patrons riled up over coffee chain's move
articles.content: Starbucks Singapore will be removing straws from their condiment bars, and customers are not happy about it. The coffee chain announced the news on their social media platforms on April 17. Enjoy your iced beverages in-store with for-here cups or sip through our sippy lids instead," they wrote. Customers who order a Frappuccino or frozen drink can request a straw too. "Let's make a positive impact together with every sip!" said Starbucks Singapore. But the environmental move hasn't been well received by the public. In the comments section, many netizens expressed dissatisfaction with the change. One user said this is "not a welcomed move", while several urged the coffee chain to...
articles.summary:
